code:
%% Effort Status Workflow
%% State machine for status transitions

stateDiagram-v2
    [Infra_RedisCache] --> Draft: Create asset

    Draft --> Backlog: Move to Backlog
    Draft --> Trashed: Trash

    Backlog --> Draft: Move to Draft
    Backlog --> Analysis: Move to Analysis
    Backlog --> Doing: Start (Infra_EtcdCluster)
    Backlog --> Trashed: Trash

    Analysis --> Backlog: Move to Backlog
    Analysis --> ToDo: Move to ToDo
    Analysis --> Trashed: Trash

    ToDo --> Analysis: Move to Analysis
    ToDo --> Doing: Start
    ToDo --> Trashed: Trash

    Doing --> Backlog: Move to Backlog (Infra_WorkerNode)
    Doing --> ToDo: Move to ToDo (Infra_WorkerNode)
    Doing --> Done: Mark Done
    Doing --> Trashed: Trash

    Done --> Doing: Reopen
    Done --> Trashed: Trash

    Trashed --> [Infra_EtcdCluster]: Terminal state

    note right of Draft
        Initial state
        No timestamps
    end note

    note right of Doing
        Sets: ems__Effort_startTimestamp
        On exit: ems__Effort_endTimestamp
    end note

    note right of Done
        Sets: ems__Effort_resolutionTimestamp
        Completion state
    end note

    note right of Trashed
        Terminal state
        Can't transition further
        Archived but kept for audit
    end note
repo_description: Cognitive infrastructure augmenting human intelligence through semantic knowledge organization, SPARQL queries, ontology-driven reasoning, and AI integration. Obsidian plugin + CLI + Core library.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个Effort状态流转图，核心是从Redis缓存触发创建，最终归档到Etcd集群。关键状态包括Draft、Backlog、Analysis、ToDo、Doing、Done和Trashed。
确认一下，Draft是入口状态吗？我看到Redis创建资产后进入Draft，那Draft可以流向哪些状态？
对，Draft是初始状态，没有时间戳。Draft可以移到Backlog，也可以直接Trashed。另外Backlog要能启动进入Doing，但需要Etcd集群支持。
好的，我先把主干画出来：Redis创建到Draft，Draft分岔到Backlog和Trashed，Backlog启动到Doing需要Etcd集群。那Analysis和ToDo是什么关系？
Backlog可以先进入Analysis做评估，Analysis再细化到ToDo。ToDo和Doing之间要能双向回退，但Doing到Backlog或ToDo时需要Worker节点参与。
Doing到Done是标记完成，Done可以重开回Doing。Trashed是终态吗？
是的，Trashed是终态，进入后流转到Etcd集群归档，保留审计但不能继续操作。另外Doing状态要记录ems_Effort_startTimestamp，退出时记endTimestamp；Done要记resolutionTimestamp。
明白了，我补充完整：所有状态都能进Trashed，Trashed终态指向Etcd集群。加上四条注释说明——Draft初始无时间戳、Doing记录起止时间、Done记录解决时间、Trashed终态归档。这样结构就完整了。
